narrative:
Perrysburg J (precinct in Wood County) has 877 registered voters, with 64.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
